title: calcitrapa verutum
intro: Calcitrapa verutum, also known as Garden Rocket or Land Cress, is a type of edible plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calcitrapa verutum include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, making it a versatile addition to a healthy diet.
